description_long: This is an ornate, upright gravestone made of weathered stone, featuring a prominent pointed arch and intricate Gothic-style carvings. The front face displays a recessed panel likely intended for inscriptions, framed by decorative columns and floral motifs. At the top, a large stone cross rises above the main structure, adding vertical emphasis and religious symbolism. The base is rectangular and sits on a patch of mossy ground, suggesting long-term outdoor placement. The sides are relatively narrow but include sculpted details, while the back is plain and unadorned. The overall appearance is solemn and historic, typical of 19th-century cemetery monuments.
description: A tall, ornate stone gravestone with Gothic carvings, a large cross on top, and a mossy base.
description_view_0: The front view shows the detailed Gothic arch, recessed inscription panel, and the prominent cross at the top.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the narrow profile and some sculpted side details, with the cross visible above.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a plain, unadorned stone surface with the cross silhouette above.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the narrow depth and side carvings, with the cross overhead.
